# Morgan Danner, Notary LLC

> Richmond, Virginia boutique mobile notary. Licensed, insured, NNA-certified.
> Offers mobile notary, loan signings, estate & trust signings, remote online
> notarization (RON), and apostille services across the Richmond metro.

## Key facts

- Commissioned Virginia notary public (commission on file with the Virginia Secretary of the Commonwealth)
- NNA Certified Notary Signing Agent
- E&O insured, bonded, annual background screened
- Service area: Richmond (all neighborhoods: The Fan, Church Hill, Shockoe Bottom, Carytown, Scott's Addition, Manchester, Museum District, Near West End, Forest Hill, Northside, Jackson Ward, Oregon Hill, West End, Downtown), plus surrounding jurisdictions: Midlothian, Glen Allen, Mechanicsville, Chester, Short Pump, Tuckahoe, Ashland, Bon Air, Colonial Heights, Hopewell, Petersburg, Sandston, Highland Springs, Varina, Moseley, Innsbrook. 50-mile flat travel radius.
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7a–9p, Sat 9a–6p, Sun 10a–5p — evenings and weekends standard, no premium
- Phone: (804) 215-6674 · Email: morgan@morgannotary.com
- Pricing is auditable against Virginia's statutory $10 max per notarial act (Va. Code § 47.1-19)

## Important policies

- A notary who is not a licensed attorney may not explain legal documents or give legal advice under Virginia Code § 54.1-3900. This site's copy follows that constraint.
- "The People's Rate" is a community discount available on direct bookings for veterans, LGBTQ+ community members, single parents, artists, activists, seniors 65+, and immigrants / DACA recipients. Honor system.
